Title: 55 lbs. Mortar Mix
Body (HTML):
Rapid Set Mortar Mix is a high quality mortar that is suitable for vertical and overhead applications. It is ideal when rapid strength gain, high durability and low shrinkage are desired. Use Mortar Mix for general and structural concrete repair, stucco and plaster repair, 1-coat exterior plaster, mortar beds, underlayment and formed work. Mortar Mix sets in 15-minutes and is ready to drive or build on in 1-hours. Durable in wet environments, it can be applied from 1\2 in. to 6 in. thick. Mortar Mix is a blend of high performance Rapid Set cement with quality sand. Mortar Mix offers superior resistance to chemical attack. It is non-metallic and no chlorides are added. Mortar Mix allows the repair areas to be painted, coated or sealed quickly after application. Under dry conditions, water-based coatings such as latex paint can be applied after the product is hardened, which usually takes 1-hours to 4-hours. Solvent-based and impermeable coatings such as oil based paint and epoxy can be applied in 16-hours.
  • Fast setting - hardens to structural strength in 1-hour
  • Ultra-durable - over 6,500 psi ultimate strength
  • Crack resistant, long-life formula
  • Bonds to concrete, brick, stone and many other surfaces
  • High performance, eco-friendly hydraulic cement formulation
  • Easy to use - just add water
  • Meets ASTM C928 requirements
  • One 55 lbs. bag yields 0.5 cu. ft.

Title: 656 oz. 200 ft. Insulation Kit Spray Foam Sealant
Body (HTML):
Built for the pros, the HandiFoam FR (HFO) is designed to fill and insulate large voids and surfaces. HandiFoam's excellent adhesion properties create a continuous air barrier which completes the building envelope, resulting in improved indoor air quality and lower heating and cooling costs. Designed to be used with the Handi-Gun and the patented ColorWise Temperature Warning nozzles to effectively seal and insulate projects of all sizes. The ColorWise Temperature Warning nozzles change from clear to blue as a visual indication that the foam is too cold and should not be dispensed until properly conditioned. To avoid off-ratio foam and yield-loss, properly condition the chemical before spraying. This product is formulated utilizing an HFO blowing agent which is part of HandiFoam's ongoing commitment to developing foam chemistries with lower global warming impact and enhanced product performance.HandiFoam is an industry-leading brand that delivers low-pressure one- and two-component polyurethane foam sealants, adhesives, pour-in-place and spray foams. HandiFoam is built on the foundation of innovations that improve. We are committed to developing products, exclusive technologies that improve the overall product performance, safety, and experience for our customers.
  • Improves indoor air quality and reduces heating and cooling costs
  • Spray foam: APOC FR (HFO) low pressure spray polyurethane foam is a 2-component system designed to fill and insulate large voids and surfaces
  • For residential and commercial use: ideal for residential use like attic air sealing, flash and batt applications, and sealing can lights, ductwork joins, rim/band joists and crawl spaces, as well as commercial use like cold storage insulation, sealing roof/wall junctures, retrofit applications and much more
  • Fills and insulates large voids and surfaces: use this spray foam insulation to effectively fill and insulate large gaps, cracks and voids, this spray foam creates a tight barrier against noise, moisture and air infiltration
  • Maximum yield is approximately 200 board feet at 1 in thickness when cured (12 in x 12 in x 1 in = 1 bdft)
  • Ensure chemical inside the tanks is 75-85°F (properly condition the kit 48 hours prior to use)
  • Apply foam approximately 1/4 to 1/2 of the desired thickness and allow for expansion up to 2 inches
  • Closed cell foam has a higher insulating value but will only expand 2-3 times the initial spray
  • UL GREENGUARD Gold Certified and meets ASTM E84 Class A 1 when sprayed at 2 inches thick
